title: everywhere everyone
body:
everywhere i go i go alone
when i get there i open up
to make myself known to new friends
i know i'm never gonna see again when i get back home
that's the way it's always been when im flowing
water only gets you wet when touching you
birds only land and sit when our work is through
but we seed the earth with flowers
quench em with these passing showers
don't mention it, this is all of ours
don't let me get in your way
nest and rest after everything you did to get this far
i hear a new sound out past the horizon
i'm a make contact while i still got my eyes in
see you when i see you
i'll come find you while you're flying
be you and i will too
be well
let it be known i can still feel you when i hold you in my mind's eye
that part makes the distance bearable
that strap makes the watch wearable
that's why i carry you in here
that's why i married you in here
cuz i'm in here wherever this ship goes
it's not on autopilot but steering is difficult
and some times i get stuck staring at screens, analog and digital
dig in on a mission missing signs that i'm missing you
lose track of the time that your living through
it's hard to imagine what i'm missing too
so back of my mind i'm miserable
still grieving all that i've lost from leaving
every different school
every conversation, every party, every clique and group
they put me in, i didn't click, i felt invisible
every church, every congregation, every ritual
everyone that wouldn't listen to my symptoms if i didn't give em proof
everyone that can't fit through the cracks that i slip into
i'm carving art in the darkness on cold stone hoping it gets to you
i'm marking out a new path on an old map
knowing you might unfold it when you see something worth getting to
